title: cymopterus newberryi
intro: Cymopterus newberryi, also known as Newberry's spring parsley, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Cymopterus newberryi include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
